comment: Five year relationship, they have handled three of our export orders flawlessly. Strongly recommend for Dubai shipments.
Second order had a small colour mismatch but they reworked it at their cost. Fair dealing.
Decent yarn quality for the price. Not premium but acceptable for retail blends.
Team is responsive during daytime. After hours follow-up is slow, which delayed one shipment.
Consistent supplier for our bandhani prints. Lead time has improved since last year.
Reliable for fabric procurement but invoicing needs improvement — three corrections on the last bill.
Quality has been steady across four shipments this quarter.

The last three shipments had acceptable quality although packaging could be better.
Good for small orders, not suitable if you need rapid turnaround on bulk.
